Add Label to Email.description: Add a label to an email message.

Create Draft Reply.description: Create a draft reply to an existing email.

Delete Email.description: Sends an email message to the trash.

Remove Label From Conversation.description: Remove a specified label from all emails within a conversation.

Remove Label From Email.description: Remove a label from an email message.

Reply to Email.description: Send a reply to an email message.

Send Email.description: Create and send a new email message.

Find Email.description: Finds an email message. Optionally, create an email if none are found.

Get Attachment by Filename.description: Retrieves a specific Gmail message attachment by Filename.
